title: Alpinestars SM5 Matte Black

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with EPS Liner

technical_analysis: The Alpinestars SM5 represents a significant evolution in full-face helmet engineering, utilizing an advanced carbon fiber composite shell that drastically reduces weight without compromising structural integrity. The internal EPS liner is engineered with multi-density zones to optimize energy absorption during impact, adhering strictly to the latest ECE 22.06 safety standards which mandate higher retention force requirements than previous generations. Aerodynamic profiling has been meticulously tuned through wind tunnel testing, featuring a streamlined chin bar and rear spoiler integration that minimizes drag while maintaining high-velocity airflow through dedicated intake and exhaust ports.
marketing_description: Dominate the track with the Alpinestars SM5 Matte Black, a helmet designed for riders who demand uncompromising performance and style. Its sleek, aggressive aesthetic is matched by cutting-edge technology that keeps you cool, quiet, and protected at high speeds. Whether you are cornering hard on a twisty mountain pass or pushing limits on the circuit, the SM5 delivers the confidence you need to perform at your absolute best.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Alpinestars SM5 Matte Black full-face helmet. Lightweight carbon fiber construction, ECE 22.06 certified, and superior aerodynamics for track and street performance.
